title: Elijah Taylor (rugby league)
description: New Zealand international rugby league footballer
extract:
Elijah Taylor (born 27 February 1990) is a New Zealand professional rugby league footballer who plays as a loose forward, second-row or hooker for Campbelltown City Kangaroos in the Macarthur Rugby League and who has represented New Zealand at international level.
He previously played for the New Zealand Warriors, Penrith Panthers and the Wests Tigers in the NRL.
